data.title: Tesla, SpaceX Search For Suppliers For Elon Musk's Terafab Project: Report
data.description: Elon Musk's Terafab project staff are contacting suppliers of semiconductor manufacturing equipment. This week, Tesla's stock has surged by over 11%. Both Tesla and SpaceX are looking for suppliers for the Terafab project, according to a report.

data.title: iRhythm Holdings to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: On April 16, 2026, iRhythm Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:IRTC), a prominent digital healthcare firm specializing in reliable solutions for disease detection, prevention, and prediction, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. The announcement is scheduled for April 30, 2026, after the market closes. Executives will conduct an accompanying conference call starting at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET.

data.title: Paylocity announces Q3 FY26 earnings conference call
data.description: The Paylocity Holding Corporation, a prominent provider of cloud-based HR, Finance, and IT solutions, based in Schaumburg, Illinois, has set a date for a conference call to discuss its third quarter fiscal 2026 results. The call is scheduled for Thursday, May 7th at 4:00 pm Central Time (5:00 pm Eastern Time). Paylocity is listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol PCTY.

data.title: FIGS Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release, Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: FIGS, Inc., a healthcare apparel brand, will be releasing its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026, following the close of U.S. markets. The company, listed on NYSE as FIGS, aims to enhance the lives of healthcare professionals globally. A conference call will be held on the same day at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET by FIGS management to delve into the financial performance and business outlook. Ahead of the call, details of the first quarter 2026 fin... will be made public.

data.title: Warby Parker to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Warby Parker Inc. will be releasing its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026, before market open on May 7, 2026. The company, listed as WRBY on the NYSE, specializes in direct-to-consumer vision products and services. A live conference call and webcast to discuss these results and the business outlook will take place at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. To join the call, dial (833) 461-5787 from the U.S. or (5... (the rest of the number was cut off).

data.title: Krispy Kreme® Announces Expansion into the Netherlands
data.description: In a recent update, Krispy Kreme, Inc. (NASDAQ: DNUT) revealed a new partnership with Jafa Holding BV to introduce Krispy Kreme to the Netherlands. It is anticipated that the inaugural store will commence operations by the end of 2026. This move signifies a notable achievement for the Company as it expands internationally via its franchise approach. The primary Netherlands Hot Light Theater Shop is set to showcase the renowned Hot Light concept of the brand, operating as both a retail store and exhibition space.

data.title: Columbia Sportswear Company to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Thursday, April 30, 2026
data.description: Columbia Sportswear Company (Nasdaq: COLM) is set to announce its first quarter 2026 financial results on April 30, 2026, at around 4:05 p.m. ET. Following this, at approximately 4:15 p.m. ET, the company's Executive Vice President and CFO, Jim Swanson, will provide commentary on the financial results. This information will be shared with the SEC on Form 8-K and made available on the company's website at https://investor.columbia.com/financial-results.

data.title: $133M donated to NPR by Connie Ballmer and an anonymous donor will aid network's strategic goals.
data.description: Two generous donors, philanthropist Connie Ballmer and an anonymous contributor, have provided substantial support to the network. The donations will help bolster the network's long-term strategy and objectives. The exact amount of the donations has not been disclosed, but they are significant and will greatly aid in the network's operations and growth.

data.title: Real Estate Expert Billy Houston of Knoxville Explains Lakefront Property Choices for HelloNation
data.description: In Knoxville, Tennessee on April 16, 2026, a PRNewswire report discusses the factors buyers should weigh when choosing between a lakefront lot and a lake-view home in the area. Real Estate Expert Billy Houston from the Billy Houston Group shared valuable insights in a HelloNation article. The article provides practical advice for potential buyers to make an informed decision.

data.title: PINK STORK'S BEEF ORGAN SUPPLEMENT EARNS CLEAN LABEL PROJECT PURITY AWARD AMID GROWING DEMAND FOR TRANSPARENT WOMEN'S SUPPLEMENTS
data.description: Pink Stork, a women's wellness supplement brand based in Jacksonville, Fla., revealed on Apr. 16, 2026, that its Beef Organ Complex has been verified for purity, potency, and transparency by an independent third-party certification. The Clean Label Project certification confirms the quality of the product. This certification ensures that the supplement meets high standards and provides confidence to consumers. This development underscores Pink Stork's commitment to delivering quality products to better serve their clientele.

data.title: Cohu To Announce First Quarter Financial Results on April 30
data.description: Cohu, Inc. (NASDAQ: COHU), a leading global provider of equipment and services for enhancing semiconductor manufacturing efficiency, is set to announce its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT/4:00 p.m. ET. Following the release, the Company will conduct a live conference call and webcast presentation at 1:30 p.m. PT/4:30 p.m. ET to delve into the results. Those interested can tune in to the live webcast.

data.title: Simplify Healthcare®, Sagility, and Convey Health Solutions Announce Strategic Alliance to Launch Sagility Synchrony
data.description: In Aurora, Illinois, Simplify Healthcare®, part of the Simplify Group™ and a prominent player in healthcare payer technology, revealed a new collaboration today. The company has partnered with Sagility and Convey Health Solutions (Convey) to introduce Sagility Synchrony. This innovative solution is specifically designed for Medicare Advantage, offering a comprehensive end-to-end lifecycle solution. Sagility Synchrony aims to eliminate disparate point solutions by providing a cohesive managed services model led by Sagility. This model is bolstered by integrated platforms that cover various aspects including plan design.
